since_last: 37% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.93%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.91% · BTC -1.86% · Gold -2.13% · Nasdaq100 -1.35%. 37% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.93%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.93%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -11.63%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.97%, SKHY +5.77%, HON +5.71%, GEV +3.54%, FIX +3.02%. Laggards: TSLA -11.63%, GOOGL -6.71%, AMZN -3.09%, PANW -2.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.47% at $114.72
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
